title: Showy's Durability+ Overlay
description: A resourcepack which adds custom durability based textures to be able to see how much durability other players have (netherite armor); it also modifies assets of the game to better suit a pvp environment (PvPTiers NethPot / MCTiers NethOP based)
body:
This overlay includes:
- **Custom netherite armor models and items which change colour depending the durability**
- Smaller totem model and lower in its breaking animation, so it doesn't cover the screen
- Reworked shield model, so it doesnt cover the screen either when blocking or standing
- Smaller critical and enchanted hit particles
- Lower fire texture, so it doesn't cover the screen
